understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the '+' goal gem tile on each level while avoiding hazards such as spikes, navigating platforms, and using breakable blocks wisely. Completing the level efficiently with the given turn and attempt limitations was required to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to left and right actions, after which gravity automatically moved the character downward until landing on a solid or hazard. Clicking was used to break specific blocks that blocked the path. Undo allowed reversing the last move or click. Hazards like spikes instantly ended the attempt if landed on. Proper planning and preview of landing outcomes were necessary to navigate to the goal safely.
